insight_events.title: Core business accelerating
insight_events.summary: Core operating metrics (cfo, operating income) are accelerating together — growth moved from -4.3% to +37.3% YoY for two consecutive quarters. Trailing-twelve-month growth confirms the same direction. Source: SEC XBRL quarterly filings.
